new_cascade_issues.title: Power generation reduced
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding the power budget during imaging mode.

new_cascade_issues.title: Structural balance altered
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the right solar panel alters the structural balance and could affect mechanical stability during launch vibrations.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal imbalance introduced
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the right solar panel may introduce thermal imbalances, affecting temperature control and stability.

new_missing_tests.activity: Random vibration test with modified solar panel configuration
new_missing_tests.reason: To verify the structural integrity and stability after removing the right solar panel.

new_missing_tests.activity: Shock response test with modified solar panel configuration
new_missing_tests.reason: To ensure compliance with shock requirements post removal of the right solar panel.
